steps.title: Find the roots
steps.content: Apply the quadratic formula with $a=4, b=5, c=-5$: $$x=\frac{-5\pm\sqrt{25+80}}{8}=\frac{-5\pm\sqrt{105}}{8}.$$

steps.title: Identify the greatest solution
steps.content: The larger root is $-\tfrac{5}{8}+\tfrac{\sqrt{105}}{8}$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice B, $-\frac{5}{8}+\frac{\sqrt{105}}{8}$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
